tokens.suppress-prompts-stamp: suppress all prompts, complete the stamp
tokens.suppress-prompts-verify: suppress all prompts, complete the verification
tokens.interactive-choice: present the choice as a clear text prompt
tokens.interactive-choice-must: Present the options clearly and wait for the user's text reply.
tokens.spawn-worker: Execute the following as a subagent
tokens.dispatch-review-agents: Dispatch review agents as subagents, each in its own context
tokens.teams-enabled: Subagents must be available for parallel execution
tokens.teams-spawn: Use subagents to spawn teammates in isolated worktrees
tokens.teams-research-spawn: Use subagents for parallel research. Each agent explores in its own context
tokens.parallel-dispatch:
Dispatch review agents as subagents when explicitly requested.
Each agent runs in its own context.
If subagents are not available, execute all review perspectives sequentially.
tokens.agent-teams:
Verify that subagent support is available for parallel execution.
If parallel execution is disabled, unavailable, unsafe, or not beneficial, continue sequentially. Sequential fallback is a successful execution mode: preserve accepted work and execute all remaining work in dependency then assignment order.
tokens.agent-teams-dispatch:
**Codex**: Use subagents when explicitly requested. Each subagent handles an independent task group.

**Fallback (no parallel mechanism)**: Execute tasks sequentially in the current session.
tokens.agent-teams-research-dispatch:
**Codex**: Use subagents for parallel research when available.

**Fallback (no parallel mechanism)**: Research all topics sequentially in the current session.
tokens.worktree-isolation:
Spex worktrees are managed via `git worktree add` and `git worktree remove` commands.
Always use git commands directly for worktree operations.

disabled.message: Teams is disabled; execute all work sequentially.

unavailable.message: Parallel subagents are unavailable; execute all work sequentially.

conflict.message: File, contract, or dependency conflicts make parallel dispatch unsafe; execute the conflicting work sequentially.

single_group.message: Only one independent work group exists; execute it sequentially without team overhead.

isolation_unavailable.message: Writer isolation cannot be established; execute all work sequentially in the validated active worktree.

fallback_note: > **Note:** This capability is not available on Codex. {fallback_text}
